how does fica tip credit work Preparation Checklist for Saint George Clients

Before your how does fica tip credit work appointment with Reclaim Tax Credits, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact Reclaim Tax Credits at 1-213-537-5613 to get started.
